completion_formula: minimum(mandatory source, requirement, artifact, test_or_waiver, evidence, staging, production, acceptance gate percentages)

blocks.name: Truth denominator and persistent Knowledge Fabric
blocks.exit_gate: Persistent source graph, counted denominator and passing no-gaps verifier

blocks.name: Sovereign control plane, security and operations
blocks.exit_gate: Enforced policies plus proven backup, restore and rollback

blocks.name: Model router, intelligence fabric and capability sourcing
blocks.exit_gate: Deterministic routing, evidence-ranked retrieval and quarantine decisions

blocks.name: Command Centre and operator UX
blocks.exit_gate: Truthful local or staging dashboard with tested failure states

blocks.name: Automation, integration and persistence
blocks.exit_gate: Signed staging canaries with retry, replay protection and rollback evidence

blocks.name: CFO, trading research, revenue and product domains
blocks.exit_gate: One verified bounded staging slice for each applicable factory

blocks.name: External P0 recovery and provider gates
blocks.exit_gate: Each task DONE_VERIFIED or remains BLOCKED with exact owner action

blocks.name: Full staging federation
blocks.exit_gate: Critical paths pass end-to-end and disaster-recovery tests

blocks.name: Final reconciliation and owner acceptance
blocks.exit_gate: All in-scope items DONE_VERIFIED or owner-accepted WAIVED

passes.name: Historical bounded batches
micro_slices: Next XRP HBAR tranche when sources exist

next_action: Execute Pass 1 on a new implementation branch; test, open PR, repair to green and merge only with evidence.
truth_boundary: This registry is an execution plan, not proof of implementation, staging, deployment or production completion.
